caption: In a classroom setting, a presentation is taking place with an audience seated and facing a projector screen displaying a slide titled "Cloud." A man stands near a table on the left side of the room, holding a microphone and appearing to speak or prepare to speak. A woman sits at a desk in the center, possibly assisting or managing equipment. The audience members are engaged, some using laptops and others looking attentively towards the front. The environment suggests an educational or professional seminar, with a focus on cloud technology. The scene remains relatively static, indicating a moment of instruction or discussion.
